# description

**Instance Property**

A text representation of the random forest classifier.

## Declaration

```swift
var description: String { get }
```

## Describing a random forest classifier

- **debugDescription**: A text representation of the random forest classifier that’s suitable for output during debugging.
- **playgroundDescription**: A description of the random forest classifier shown in a playground.
